productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Printed Blue Tshirts
description: Composition   Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, graphic and rubber print on the chest, and brand tab on the left sleeveFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash with cold water using a non-chlorine detergentWash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wringTumble dry lowDry inside out in shadeMedium heat steam iron do not iron on decorationsExuding fun and joy of the summer carnival and weekend fest of 1851 in California, this T-shirt from arrow is designed for those fun occasions with friends and family. Crafted from soft cotton, this tee is sure to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with jeans or shorts and enjoy those happy days either way in style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
